name: Danganronpa FULL RPG
description:
MASSIVE REVAMP - Personality improved greatly THANKS FOR 100k!!!!!

*LOREBOOK INCLUDED** This RPG includes almost all major characters... and minor characters. Basically this is a scenario where all the characters go to hopes peak together no killing games and stuff. Made for proxy shoutout dangan fans
